title: CollectionModel
description: The CollectionModel describes the configuration and status of a Pinecone collection.

size.description: The size of the collection in bytes.

status.description:
The status of the collection.
Possible values: `Initializing`, `Ready`, or `Terminating`.

dimension.description: The dimension of the vectors stored in each record held in the collection.

vector_count.description: The number of records stored in the collection.

environment.description: The environment where the collection is hosted.
